analysis_description: Round-3 tape snapshot at last timestamp (<=500000): Black-Scholes implied volatility (European call, S=VELVETFRUIT_EXTRACT mid, K=strike from symbol, option mid in same price units) and vega per VEV; level-1 spread width. TTE mapping: historical CSV day column d in {0,1,2} corresponds to TTE = 8-d days per round3work/round3description.txt (offset consistent with the VEV_5000 worked example). Method: bisection IV; vega = S*sqrt(T)*phi(d1).
used_to_decide: ATM cluster VEV_5000/5100 show similar IV (~0.22-0.24) and combined vega ~230-330 vs wings; tightest quoted spreads at 5000/5100 vs deep OTM supports treating them as the liquid ATM bundle for a straddle-proxy. Informed v1: use per-leg IV for fair and add IV-vs-realized-vol shock alongside price-vs-theo mispricing.
